ddls:
CREATE TABLE "admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission record */,
  "private" INTEGER /* Whether the university is private or not */,
  "apps" INTEGER /* Number of applications received */,
  "accepted" INTEGER /* Number of students accepted */,
  "enrolled" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "top_10perc" REAL /* Percentage of students in the top 10% of their high school class */,
  "top_25perc" REAL /* Percentage of students in the top 25% of their high school class */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for the admission record */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the admission record belongs to */,
  "international_students" INTEGER /* Number of international students */,
  "minority_students" REAL /* Percentage of minority students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record the financial data belongs to */,
  "outstate" INTEGER /* Out-of-state tuition fees */,
  "room_board" INTEGER /* Room and board costs */,
  "books" INTEGER /* Cost of books and supplies */,
  "personal" INTEGER /* Personal expenses */,
  "financial_year" TEXT /* Financial year */,
  "scholarships" INTEGER /* Total scholarships awarded */,
  "research_funding" INTEGER /* Funding allocated for research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record the faculty data belongs to */,
  "phd" INTEGER /* Number of PhD holders */,
  "terminal" INTEGER /* Number of terminal degree holders */,
  "sf_ratio" REAL /* Student-faculty ratio */,
  "perc_alumni" REAL /* Percentage of alumni */,
  "expend" INTEGER /* Expenditures per student */,
  "faculty_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the faculty */,
  "publications" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the faculty */,
  "teaching_load" REAL /* Average teaching load per faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduation_rates" (
  "grad_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduation rate record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record the graduation rate belongs to */,
  "grad_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the graduation rate belongs to */,
  "time_to_graduate" REAL /* Average time taken to graduate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grad_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_graduation_rates_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enroll_demographics" (
  "enroll_demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment demographics record */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record the enrollment demographics belongs to */,
  "f_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of full-time undergraduates */,
  "p_undergrad" INTEGER /* Number of part-time undergraduates */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students by ethnicity */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of students by age */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enroll_demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enroll_demographics_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admission record the university belongs to */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* National ranking of the university */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_universities_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES admissions ("admission_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each admission record
Whether the university is private or not
Percentage of students in the top 10% of their high school class
Percentage of students in the top 25% of their high school class
Academic year for the admission record
ID of the department the admission record belongs to
